en: A group of people who work together, especially all those involved in operating a ship, aircraft, etc.
en_example: I'm going to start with the fucking crew!
zh_example: 我要先對付該死的傢伙們！
ja: くそったれな連中から始めるぞ！
ja_example: I'm going to start with the fucking crew!

en: To extend or reach out over a distance or area.
en_example: We gotta stretch one of them!
ja_example: We gotta stretch one of them!

en: To leap or spring down from a higher place.
An expression used to tell someone to hurry up or start moving.
en_example: Move it, move it, move it!
ja_example: Move it, move it, move it!

en: With or in proximity to another person or people.
